title: It Shouldn't Be This Hard Podcast

sections.title: It Shouldn't Be This Hard
sections.subtitle: The podcast for people who know that responsible business is messy, meaningful, and probably much harder than it should be!

sections.heading: About the Show
paragraphs: In each episode, grounded co-founders, Heidi Schoeneck and Phil White sit down with founders, corporate changemakers, sustainability leaders, social entrepreneurs, and thought leaders who've been there and are doing it. Our fearless founders will get into the honest conversations most people avoid — about power, profit, fear, failure, purpose, and the many barriers and obstacles that often frustrate progress.
With a little help from Gaia, grounded's AI sidekick, they will poke at the uncomfortable questions and unpack the messy middle. And to wrap it up?
The show will bubble up insights from behavioral science and spirituality (so we get unique perspectives from both sides of the conscious leadership coin).

sections.heading: Apply to Be a Guest!
sections.description: Maybe you've been there. You took the leap. You built the business. You challenged the status quo. And you've got the scars (and wisdom) to prove it? Or you're right in it. Pushing for real change inside a legacy company. Trying to shift systems that don't want to budge. If any of this sounds like you — we want to hear your war stories, your wisdom, and your wipe-outs!
